mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.description FROM sys_role r JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_permission p JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, username, nickname, phone, email, status, create_time FROM sys_user ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}

select * from sys_user su where 1 = 1
and su.username like concat('%',#{dto.username},'%')
and su.nickname like concat('%',#{dto.nickname},'%')
and su.status = #{dto.status}
order by su.create_time desc

select su.id, su.username, su.nickname, su.phone, su.email, su.status, su.create_time, sr.id as role_id, sr.role_name, sr.description from sys_user su left join sys_user_role sur on su.id = sur.user_id left join sys_role sr on sur.role_id = sr.id where 1 = 1
and su.username like concat('%',#{dto.username},'%')
and su.nickname like concat('%',#{dto.nickname},'%')
and su.status = #{dto.status}
and exists ( select 1 from sys_user_role sur2 where sur2.user_id = su.id and sur2.role_id = #{dto.roleId} )
order by su.create_time desc, sr.id asc
